'''Liiria Beldonna''' was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] leader of an organization of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]<ref name="SotePG" /> known as [[Beldonna's League]],<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> also referred to as "Beldonna's Legion."<ref name="SotePG" />

==Biography==
Liiria Beldonna was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]<ref name="SotePG" /> woman born sometime around [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].<ref name="Age" /> As an adult, she was considered attractive and relatively frail-looking, but in actuality she had well-toned muscles and could handle herself well in a fight. She was a confident woman and an inspiring leader, and trained herself in the use of most weapons. Beldonna had long, straight black hair that she usually kept braided when she was working.<ref name="SotePG" />

By roughly [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], she had built up an organization of hired mercenaries referred to as "Beldonna's League"<ref name="SWG" /> or "Beldonna's Legion."<ref name="SotePG" /> Elements of the group were stationed on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SWG" /> Beldonna led the Legion under a strict set of rules and did not tolerate misconduct. Any disputes were often dealt with through hand-to-hand combat. Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the group was hired by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Consul-General]] [[Gilad Halsek]] of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], who was infatuated with Beldonna, to help bolster the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] security. Beldonna enjoyed her position on Kothlis and frequently took her team hunting in the forest or the planet's [[Water/Legends|ice]] caps. She also enjoyed parading about the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Tal'cara]] and going to its most popular nightspots.<ref name="SotePG" />
